careers.title: Ọrụ na DeHub
careers.subtitle: Sonyere otu a na-ewu ọdịnihu nke social media enweghị etiti
careers.intro: Anyị na-achọ ndị nwere mmasị chọrọ ịbụ akụkụ nke ebili mmiri ọzọ nke social media. Ọnọdụ ọrụ niile bụ na-arụ ọrụ n'ebe ọ bụla nke oge ịgbanwe.
careers.bdmAbout: Dị ka Onye Njikwa Mmepe Azụmaahịa na DeHub ị ga-abụ ike na-akwagharị atụmatụ mmekọrịta anyị.
careers.bdmResp1: Chọpụta ma kwado mmekọrịta atụmatụ na ụlọ ọrụ Web2 na Web3
careers.bdmResp2: Wuo ma jikwaa usoro ndị mmekọrịta nwere ike ịbụ
careers.bdmResp3: Nọchite anya DeHub na mmemme ụlọ ọrụ
careers.bdmResp4: Kwurịta usoro mmekọrịta na ụdị ịkewa ego
careers.bdmResp5: Soro ndị otu ngwaahịa na ahịa rụọ ọrụ
careers.bdmReq1: Ahụmịhe gosiri na mmepe azụmaahịa ma ọ bụ ire ahịa na teknọlọjị ma ọ bụ Web3
careers.bdmReq2: Netwọk siri ike na ogige crypto/Web3 bụ uru ukwu
careers.bdmReq3: Nkà nkwurịta okwu na ịgba nkwurịta di mma
careers.bdmReq4: Onye na-akwali onwe ya ma nwee afọ ojuju na ịrụ ọrụ n'onwe ya
careers.bdmReq5: Mmasị n'eziokwu na social media enweghị etiti ma ọ bụ blockchain
careers.bdmComp: Ọnọdụ ọrụ a na-enye ụgwọ ntọala a ga-ekwurịta ya yana usoro ọmụma OTE enweghị njedebe.
careers.ambassadorAbout: Dị ka Onye Nnọchite Anya Aha DeHub ị bụ ihu na olu nke ikpo okwu a na obodo gị.
careers.ambassadorResp1: Mepụta ma kesaa ọdịnaya n'eziokwu gbasara DeHub
careers.ambassadorResp2: Sonyere n'ọrụ na obodo DeHub na ngwa ahụ
careers.ambassadorResp3: Nọchite anya DeHub na mmemme n'ezie
careers.ambassadorResp4: Wetara ndị ọhụrụ na ikpo okwu a site na netwọk gị
careers.ambassadorReq2: Mmasị na Web3, crypto ma ọ bụ omenala ndị okike
careers.ambassadorReq4: Onye na-akwali onwe ya, nwere ike ịhazi mkpọsa n'onwe ya
careers.ambassadorReq5: Ahụmịhe gara aga dị ka onye nnọchite anya bụ uru
careers.ambassadorComp: Ndị nnọchite anya na-anata ụgwọ ọnwa a ga-ekwurịta ya.
